title: ActionHunger
description: A 'Hunger Overhaul' inspired take on the health and food systems of Minecraft for Fabric.
body:
This is a mod designed at bringing 'Hunger Overhaul' to Fabric with some improvements and additional features. Hunger Overhaul heavily inspired this mod. ActionHunger works great with AppleSkin to visualize foods hunger restoration effect.

* Added Changes:

  * Constant regen, allowing more combat and less shoving food into your face.
  * Exhaustion system, letting you customize many aspects of what causes exhaustion as well as how much exhaustion. Even the exhaustion for using a shield to prevent players from shield walling to hide from any and all dmg.
  * Food/Saturation regen system, this will let you choose how much 'extra' healing a player can obtain when over a certain hunger/saturation threshold.
  * Custom respawn health/hunger, to prevent players from dyeing in order to gain advantage.
  * Custom low health/hunger buffs/debuffs, reward players for staying over a defined health/hunger... or punish them for falling to low.
  * Change min food required to sprint.
  * Custom sleep buffs, if you sleep through the night you can give players custom bonus' and effects.
* And so much more!

Here is a link to the original project for Hunger Overhaul.
https://github.com/progwml6/HungerOverhaul

Codded by: Minenash <3

Updated by: Tenebris Mors <3

Sponsored/Designed by: VoidLock
